title: ilex californica
intro: Ilex californica, also known as California holly or California evergreen holly, is a shrub or small tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can help soothe digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ilex californica include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and providing antioxidant properties to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and immune function.
